title: With Arms Wide Open
why_this_song: Father-to-son narrative in present perfect + future. B1 challenge: follow emotional progression across verses.

exercises.prompt_en: Fill the blank in this line:

exercises.excerpt: Well, I just heard the news today
exercises.teacher_note: Auto-generated from synced lyrics — add the model translation when reviewing.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "With Arms Wide Open" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "With Arms Wide Open" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Match each English word or phrase to its Portuguese meaning.
exercises.prompt_pt: Associe cada palavra ou expressão em inglês ao significado em português.

exercises.prompt_en: Put the words in the right order:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque as palavras na ordem certa:

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "welcome" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "welcome" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Well, I just heard the news today
To be the man I have to be

teaching_notes_md: **Pedagogy:** Slow tempo + clear diction make it accessible for B1. Themes of new beginnings and parenthood — good for emotional vocabulary.

lines: Well, I don't know if I'm ready
To be the man I have to be
I'll show you everything, oh yeah
